Dialog.name: SYS_AUTO_RECOVER_HP_FULL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All party members are at full health.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_AUTO_RECOVER_NO_SKIL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There are no party members with healing skills.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_AUTO_RECOVER_SP_LESS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There is not enough SP for Auto-Recover.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_AUTO_RECOVER_SP_LESS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ran out of SP to use a healing skill. Auto-Recover will be canceled.[n]{f 1 1}
